description_long: This is a stylized doll resembling a schoolgirl, featuring a short, pleated navy skirt and a matching navy vest over a white short-sleeved blouse. The doll has short, straight, silver-gray hair and large, expressive blue eyes, with a small, neutral mouth. A prominent orange bow is tied at the collar, adding a pop of color to the otherwise subdued uniform. The doll's arms are extended horizontally, and it wears knee-high dark socks and brown shoes. The overall design is reminiscent of Japanese anime or manga characters, with smooth, simplified features and a youthful appearance. The surface appears to be made of molded plastic, giving it a slightly glossy finish.
description: A stylized schoolgirl doll with short silver-gray hair, a navy uniform, orange bow, and brown shoes, featuring large blue eyes and a smooth plastic finish.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the short silver-gray hair, navy vest, pleated skirt, and knee-high socks.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the doll's profile, arm extension, and the layered skirt and shoe details.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the doll's large blue eyes, orange bow, white blouse, and full facial features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the doll's profile, arm extension, and the pleated skirt and shoe from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_style: Japanese school uniform style with a navy pleated skirt, navy vest, white short-sleeved blouse, orange bow tie, knee-high black socks, and brown loafers.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and close together, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with slightly upturned mouth corners, wide open blue eyes, and relaxed eyebrows.
attribute_hair_style: Short, straight, silver-gray bob with bangs covering the forehead.
